summary: Iteration 165: Economy Admin, Encounters, and Living Journal - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 37/37 tests passed covering Exchange Rate (get/set with validation 10-10000), Dust Conversion (sliding scale with communal modifier), Premium Modules (5 modules with access check via subscription/purchase/nexus), Communal Goals (3 goals with contribution tracking), Environmental Bosses (daily boss with timer puzzle mechanics), NPC Rivals (Sprinter/Specialist with stealth/speed buffs), World Veins (collective frequency meditation bosses), and Living Journal (AI-generated narratives via Gemini).
seed_data_creation: User has ~1257 credits, Nexus subscription active, 6 specimens (emerald polished, jade, moss_agate, green_tourmaline, malachite, peridot). Exchange rate set to 150 dust/credit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 165 features fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/economy/exchange-rate (returns base_rate, effective_rate, communal_bonus, bonus_active), POST /api/economy/set-exchange-rate (validates 10-10000 range), POST /api/economy/convert-dust (uses sliding scale with communal modifier), GET /api/economy/modules (5 premium modules: cosmic_mixer_advanced 500cr, starseed_workbench 800cr, dream_realms_deep 600cr, wisdom_branches 300cr, digital_seeds_rare 400cr), POST /api/economy/unlock-module, GET /api/economy/check-access/{module_id} (returns has_access, reason: subscription/nexus_subscription/purchased/locked), GET /api/economy/communal-goals (3 goals: enlightenment, rapid_tumbling, vein_crack), POST /api/economy/contribute-communal. Encounters: GET /api/encounters/daily-boss (3 types: unstable_vein 60s/5 actions, crystal_maze 90s/4 actions, geothermal_surge 45s/6 actions), POST /api/encounters/attempt-boss (success requires actions within time), GET /api/encounters/rival (Sprinter bulk miner, Specialist legendary hunter), POST /api/encounters/rival-action (mine/stealth/speed_burst), GET /api/encounters/world-veins (heart_frequency 528Hz/10 participants, crown_resonance 963Hz/25 participants), POST /api/encounters/contribute-vein (requires frequency ±10% tolerance and minimum duration). Living Journal: GET /api/journal/entries, GET /api/journal/for-specimen/{id}, POST /api/journal/generate (AI via Gemini, requires owned specimen), POST /api/journal/add-reflection (max 1000 chars). Marketplace /api/marketplace/convert-dust now delegates to economy admin.

GET /api/economy/check-access known modu.details: Returns has_access and reason (nexus_subscription for test user)

GET /api/encounters/daily-boss returns b.details: Returns id, name, time_limit_seconds, required_actions, completed

POST /api/encounters/attempt-boss succes.details: Returns success=true when actions completed within time

POST /api/encounters/attempt-boss time f.details: Returns success=false, within_time=false when over limit

GET /api/encounters/rival returns NPC.details: Returns name, title, active_dialogue, rival_score, user_score

GET /api/journal/entries returns journal.details: Returns entries array and total count

POST /api/journal/generate creates AI na.details: Gemini generates narrative with geological/spiritual data

POST /api/marketplace/convert-dust deleg.details: Uses economy admin sliding scale rate

living_journal_details.ai_provider: Gemini 3 Flash via emergent LLM key
living_journal_details.narrative_style: Second person, mystical but grounded, 3-4 sentences
